title: Remove requires for ostree-lib in rpm spec file
body:
I stupidly added this in a previous patch. rpm figures this
out for you so no need to specify.  On RHEL systems ostree-libs
does not exist.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 8742452 has been approved by `rhatdan`
